title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Visual Merchandiser with drive and ambition, Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates in Bhopal is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates:
Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Costa Coffee India Asia Pacific Associates!
